functions.name: cmd_setup
functions.doc: Thiết lập API key và provider.

functions.name: _parse_kv_file
functions.doc: Parse a key=value config file and set env vars. Returns True if any value was loaded.

functions.name: _load_toml
functions.doc: Parse a TOML file with tomllib (Python 3.11+). Returns None if unavailable or invalid.

functions.name: _apply_toml_to_config
functions.doc: Populate AppConfig fields from a parsed TOML dict.

methods.name: _init_services
methods.doc: Explicitly initialize all service attributes — no magic __getattr__ delegation.

methods.name: stop
methods.doc: Interrupt and stop agent execution.

methods.name: shutdown
methods.doc: Release service resources (DB connections, etc.).

methods.name: _transition_to
methods.doc: Transition agent to a new state with logging.

methods.name: _persist_run_state
methods.doc: Persist long-term memory (structured, no raw tool output) + conversation history.

methods.name: _configure_pipeline
methods.doc: Auto-detect build/lint commands from the project (legacy — kept for backward compat).

methods.name: _runtime_verify_files
methods.doc: Per-file runtime verification: syntax + import check cho từng file.

methods.name: _has_leaked_code
methods.doc: Return True if AI response contains large markdown code blocks or raw HTML source instead of tool tags.

methods.name: _is_awaiting_user_input
methods.doc: Detect if AI is asking user a question or waiting for selection.

methods.name: _is_conversational_response
methods.doc: Detect if AI response is purely conversational (greeting, explanation) with no actionable work.

methods.name: _extract_plan_steps
methods.doc: Parse top-level plan steps — ưu tiên hierarchical plan (active milestone tasks).

methods.name: _build_plan_review_retry_message
methods.doc: Ask the AI to reconcile actual work against the approved plan before DONE.

methods.name: _validate_plan_review
methods.doc: Validate whether the AI reconciled the approved plan before finishing.

methods.name: _build_plan_guard_prompt
methods.doc: Build upfront execution instructions for plan reconciliation.

methods.name: _build_task_review_retry_message
methods.doc: Ask the AI to provide a concrete completion review before DONE.

methods.name: _validate_task_review
methods.doc: Validate the generic completion contract before accepting DONE.

methods.name: _build_completion_guard_prompt
methods.doc: Build the generic DONE contract prompt.

methods.name: _check_cross_file_consistency
methods.doc: Check that multi-file edits haven't broken cross-file references.

methods.name: _smart_truncate
methods.doc: Cắt text tại ranh giới tự nhiên (paragraph/line), không cắt giữa code block.

methods.name: _repair_json
methods.doc: Sửa lỗi JSON phổ biến của LLM: trailing comma, missing quotes, etc.

methods.name: _extract_hierarchical_plan
methods.doc: Parse JSON từ response LLM → (HierarchicalPlan, raw_json_string).

methods.name: _render_hierarchical_plan
methods.doc: Chuyển HierarchicalPlan → Markdown hiển thị cho user.

methods.name: _get_epic_anchor
methods.doc: Lấy Epic (mục tiêu tối cao) để ghim vào context.

methods.name: _get_active_tasks_text
methods.doc: Lấy tasks của milestone hiện tại để inject vào context.

methods.name: _advance_milestone
methods.doc: Chuyển sang milestone tiếp theo. Trả về True nếu còn milestone, False nếu hết.

methods.name: _format_plan_window
methods.doc: If using hierarchical plan: show Epic + only current milestone's tasks.

methods.name: _progressive_context_condense
methods.doc: Condense early messages and re-inject original goal for long-running tasks.

methods.name: _build_signal_context
methods.doc: Collect all signals → rank → cap → format context string.

methods.name: _build_context
methods.doc: Build project context with long-term memory from past tasks.

methods.name: _format_depgraph_context
methods.doc: Dependency Graph context injection — tìm file liên quan đến prompt,

methods.name: _check_semantic_damage
methods.doc: So sánh AST trước và sau khi write, phát hiện function/class bị xoá + export break.

methods.name: _should_load_design_system
methods.doc: Check if the project has web UI files (HTML, TSX, JSX, CSS).

methods.name: _get_project_tree
methods.doc: Build a compact project tree (depth 3) showing directory structure.

methods.name: _is_vague_request
methods.doc: Check if a request is too vague for auto execution.

methods.name: _cli_plan_approval
methods.doc: CLI fallback plan approval (used outside TUI).

methods.doc: Create and populate the ToolRegistry with all known tools.

methods.name: _execute_tool
methods.doc: Execute a single tool call via the ToolRegistry.

methods.doc: Pre-commit validation: parse AST/syntax TRƯỚC khi ghi file.

methods.doc: Split large content into section-marked chunks, write skeleton + each section.

methods.doc: Execute an anchor-based patch — safe section replacement.

methods.name: _execute_refactor
methods.doc: Execute a multi-file refactor with atomic rollback.

methods.name: _rollback_refactor
methods.doc: Restore files to their pre-refactor state.

methods.name: _snapshot_before_write
methods.doc: Snapshot current file content before modification.

methods.name: _execute_rollback
methods.doc: Restore the most recent snapshot from rollback stack.

methods.name: _execute_codebase_outline
methods.doc: Return project outline: file paths + classes/functions (no code).

methods.name: _execute_search_replace_block
methods.doc: Parse Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks and apply each as a patch.

methods.name: _check_syntax

methods.name: _check_file_completeness

methods.name: _detect_error_report

methods.name: _workspace_health_scan
methods.doc: Return a compact report of obviously broken project files.

methods.name: _diagnose_file
methods.doc: Comprehensive file diagnosis — read, analyze, check dependencies, run tools.

methods.name: _deep_diagnose
methods.doc: Maximum-depth recursive diagnostic — read all related files, run tools, find everything.

methods.name: _deep_structure_check
methods.doc: Aggressive structure analysis — find every possible issue.

methods.doc: Run external tools (HTML validators, CSS linters, JS checkers) and return results.

methods.name: _find_dependencies
methods.doc: Find all external files referenced by this file (CSS, JS, images, etc).
